zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Wroth於1516年出生在英國米德萊可時，他的父親Sir Robert Wroth26歲，母親Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent30歲。他於1536年10月4日與Mary Rich在英國米德萊可恩費爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1573年10月9日在英國米德萊可恩費爾德享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦恩費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Wroth于1516年出生在英国米德萊可时，他的父亲Sir Robert Wroth26岁，母亲Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent30岁。他于1536年10月4日与Mary Rich在英国米德萊可恩費爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1573年10月9日在英国米德萊可恩費爾德享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦恩費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Wroth was born in 1516, in Middlesex, England, his father, Sir Robert Wroth, was 26 and his mother, Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent, was 30. He married Mary Rich on 4 October 1536, in Enfield, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 9 October 1573, in Enfield, Middlesex, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Enfield, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Wroth est né en 1516, à Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Wroth, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mary Rich le 4 octobre 1536, à Enfield, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 9 octobre 1573, à Enfield, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Enfield, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Wroth 1516 in Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Wroth 26 und seine Mutter Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent 30. Er hat am 4. Oktober 1536 in Enfield, Middlesex, England Mary Rich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Oktober 1573 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Enfield, Middlesex, England und wurde in Enfield, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Wroth è nato il nel 1516 nel Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Wroth, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Mary Rich il 4 ottobre 1536, nel Enfield, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 9 ottobre 1573, nel Enfield, Middlesex, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Enfield, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Wrothが1516年にイギリスミッドレセックスで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Wrothは26歳，母Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kentは30歳であった。1536年10月4日にイギリスミッドレセックスエンフィールドでMary Richと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1573年10月9日にイギリスミッドレセックスエンフィールドで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンエンフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Wroth(이)가 1516년 영국 미들레세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Wroth(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1536년 10월 4일 영국 미들레세스 필드에서 Mary Rich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1573년 10월 9일 영국 미들레세스 필드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Wroth nasceu em 1516, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Wroth, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Rich em 4 de outubro de 1536, em Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de outubro de 1573, em Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Enfield, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Wroth родился в 1516 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Wroth было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Rich 4 октября 1536 г. в местности энфиелд, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 9 октября 1573 г. в местности энфиелд, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности энфиелд, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Wroth nació en 1516, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Wroth, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Mary Rich el 4 de octubre de 1536, en Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 9 de octubre de 1573, en Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Enfield, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
